news.headline: American Lung Association invests $22 million in lung health research, funding 139 projects, solidifying its leadership in the field.
news.summary: An organization has recently supported 139 projects as part of its commitment to advancing lung health research. The American Lung Association Research Institute revealed a significant research investment of $22 million within the last year, solidifying its position as a leading contributor in the field. This initiative showcases the organization's ongoing dedication to supporting innovative research initiatives aimed at improving lung health.

news.headline: Verisk estimates insured losses for Hurricane Milton at USD 30-50 billion due to wind, storm surge, and flood losses in Florida.
news.summary: In Boston on October 16, 2024, the Extreme Event Solutions team at Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK) projected that the insured industry losses from Hurricane Milton on onshore property would range from USD 30 billion to USD 50 billion. This estimate covers damages from wind, privately insured storm surge estimates, and privately insured flood losses caused by precipitation following the hurricane's landfall in Florida. Wind-related damages account for the majority of the insured losses.

news.headline: Promising fentanyl vaccine in development could help combat opioid crisis.
NGOs can utilize blockchain tech for faster aid distribution. Mercy Corps CIO shares insights.
news.summary: Blockchain technology is revolutionizing the distribution of humanitarian aid with its speed and efficiency. According to Scott Onder, Chief Information Officer of Mercy Corps, this innovative approach is crucial in delivering assistance in a swift and effective manner. With blockchain, the process of delivering aid is streamlined, allowing for quick response to emergency situations. This technology has the potential to significantly impact global aid efforts.

news.headline: Poll by LCF & BSP Research shows California Latino voters crucial in US House balance, focusing on CA-13 with 50% Latino voters.
news.summary: A recent poll conducted by the Latino Community Foundation (LCF) in collaboration with BSP Research revealed crucial insights about Latino voters in California's five competitive congressional districts. These districts play a significant role in deciding the party that will hold the U.S. House of Representatives in the next term, with Latino voters representing a substantial portion of each district. Specifically, in CA-13 (Merced), Latinos constitute 50% of all eligible voters. This data underscores the importance of Latino voter turnout in these key districts for the upcoming elections.

news.headline: Medigene to present at 3 upcoming scientific conferences in Oct-Nov 2024: PEGS in Barcelona, Cell 2024 in London, SITC in Houston.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Medigene AG, a company specializing in oncology research and development of T cell receptor (TCR)-guided therapies for cancer treatment, announced its participation at key conferences. The Company, listed as FSE: MDG1 on Prime Standard, will present at the 16th Annual Protein & Antibody Engineering Summit (PEGS) in Barcelona from November 5-7, 2024, and at the Cell 2024 conference in London from November 6-8, 2024. Additionally, Medigene will showcase two posters at the 39th Society for Immunotherapy of Cancer (SITC) in Houston, TX, USA from November 6-10, 2024.

news.headline: Norsk Hydro ASA updates on share buyback program, no specific numbers provided.
news.summary: Details on transactions conducted as part of the share buyback initiative for Norsk Hydro ASA have been disclosed. A total of X shares were repurchased at an average price of Y per share, amounting to a total expenditure of Z. This buyback effort aimed at optimizing capital structure and enhancing shareholder value. The transactions represent a significant step towards achieving these strategic objectives for the company.

news.headline: Immuron CEO Steven Lydeamore to speak at Maxim Virtual Healthcare Conference on Oct 16 at 4.30pm US Eastern time.
news.summary: In Melbourne, Australia, on October 16, 2024, Immuron Limited (ASX: IMC; NASDAQ: IMRN) announced that CEO Steven Lydeamore will engage in a fireside chat at the Maxim Virtual Healthcare Conference on October 16, 2024, at 4:30pm U.S. Eastern time.

news.headline: LanzaTech receives $3M from DOE to convert waste CO2 into isopropanol, a sustainable alcohol.
news.summary: A new project leverages waste CO2 to create sustainable isopropanol, a widely-used alcohol found in various everyday items. This innovative process offers a potential solution to environmental challenges by utilizing 500 metric tons of CO2 annually. Isopropanol produced through this method can help reduce the carbon footprint and advance sustainability goals.

news.headline: Medallion Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: MFIN) will report Q3 2024 results on Oct. 29 after the market closes.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Medallion Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: MFIN) disclosed that it will release its financial results for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, after the market closes on October 29, 2024. Medallion Financial Corp. is a specialty finance firm that provides loans in consumer and commercial sectors, along with loan services through fintech partners. The Company's upcoming report is highly anticipated by investors and analysts, as it will offer insights into its performance during the third quarter of 2024. Investors and stakeholders will be closely monitoring the announcement to assess the company's financial health and future prospects.

news.headline: Parsons secures $25M contracts for Middle East transportation projects; total awards with the customer now exceed $90M.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Parsons Corporation (NYSE:PSN) revealed that they secured two contracts valued at $25 million for design engineering services for a transportation client in the Middle East. This adds to the company's total contract wins with the same client to over $90 million within the past 9 months.

news.headline: Digital fraud from Canada increased by 11% since H1 2023. In H1 2024, 5.7% of transactions were suspected fraud; 54% of Canadians targeted by fraud.
news.summary: During the first half of 2024, approximately 5.7% of digital transactions from Canada were flagged as potential instances of digital fraud. Additionally, a significant 54% of Canadians reported experiencing recent attempts of fraud targeting them.

news.headline: Gilat Satellite Networks to present at LD Micro Invitational Conference on Oct 30 at 8 am PT.
news.summary: The presentation is scheduled for Wednesday, October 30th at 8 am Pacific Time.

news.headline: Food Basics celebrates Diwali with innovative drone show at Ottawa's Capital Diwali Mela Event due to residential firework bans.
news.summary: Food Basics is responding to residential firework bans by introducing a unique drone show at Ottawa’s Capital Diwali Mela Event. The event will feature a display of drones showcasing impressive formations and designs in the sky. This initiative comes after the restrictions imposed on traditional fireworks due to safety concerns in residential areas. The drone show aims to provide a safe and entertaining alternative for the community to enjoy. Residents and attendees can look forward to a visually stunning experience while celebrating the festival of lights.

news.headline: SmartBear Connect event in Boston on Oct 16, 2024, explores AI-driven advancements in software development. #AI
news.summary: A developer event is set to take place at SmartBear headquarters in Boston on Wednesday, October 16, 2024. The event will focus on the most recent and efficient development strategies tailored for the GenAI era.

news.headline: Kaiser introduces Canadian-made frozen oat desserts nationwide, crafted by farmer Nathan Kaiser, offering family-sized tubs and chocolate-dipped bars.
news.summary: In Montreal, the demand for oat-based products is on the rise, leading to the nationwide introduction of Kaiser, a new frozen oat-based dessert brand. Founded by Nathan Kaiser, a Canadian farmer with a background in small-batch oat harvesting, Kaiser utilizes years of experience to create a creamy texture using high-quality Canadian oats. Kaiser offers a range of products, including family-sized tubs and round chocolate-dipped bars, catering to the popular oat-based product trend.

news.headline: Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. (FDP) to release Q3 2024 financial results on October 31, 2024, and host conference call at 11:00 am ET.
news.summary: Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. (NYSE: FDP) based in Coral Gables, Florida, revealed its plan to release third-quarter financial results on October 31, 2024. This will be done before the market opens, to be followed by a quarterly conference call at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to review the financial outcomes. Those interested, including institutional investors and analysts, can participate in the live call by dialing 1 (888) 330-2454 (Domestic/T.

news.headline: OneTrust launches revamped DataGuidance research for regulatory complexity, enhances user experience. (Character count: 112)
news.summary: A revolutionary regulatory research experience has been launched to address the increasing complexity in regulations. OneTrust, a leading platform, has introduced this cutting-edge solution on October 16, 2024, in collaboration with Atlanta and Madrid, Spain. This platform aims to assist organizations in utilizing data and AI ethically.

news.headline: Covered California partners with Google to enhance cybersecurity, securing CalHEERS platform and customer data.
news.summary: In collaboration, Google Public Sector and Deloitte have established a comprehensive security operations center for Covered California's CalHEERS health benefits marketplace. This center aims to enhance cyber threat detection and response capabilities, facilitating the mitigation of more threats at a faster pace. The initiative, announced on October 16, 2024, involves Washington and Sacramento, California. The partnership seeks to bolster Covered California's security posture by leveraging advanced technologies and expertise from Google and Deloitte.

news.headline: Always Best Care Senior Services in Terre Haute has new owners, Ryan & Ashley Mitchell, providing senior care services.
news.summary: A couple from the local community in Roseville, California, Ryan and Ashley Mitchell, have assumed leadership roles to offer compassionate senior care. This initiative is by Always Best Care Senior Services, a prominent franchise system for senior care in the US. The announcement was made on October 16, 2024.

news.headline: Birch Gold Group launches exclusive silver Britannia coins from The Royal Mint in 1/2 oz and 5 oz sizes.
news.summary: In a recent press release from Iowa on October 16, 2024, Birch Gold Group revealed the introduction of two highly anticipated fixed-mintage coins from The Royal Mint in the UK. The new 1/2 oz and 5 oz silver Britannia coins have been officially launched, marking a notable milestone in the industry. These exclusive coins are set to become key additions to collectors, enthusiasts, and investors seeking prestigious pieces for their portfolios.

news.headline: Knexus secures 5-year IDIQ with DLA to offer GenAI Solutions; leverages Google Cloud AI models for efficiency.
news.summary: Knexus, a prominent AI solutions provider, has recently been granted a 5-year Indefinite Delivery/Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ) contract leveraging Google Cloud AI models. This was disclosed on October 16, 2024, at NATIONAL HARBOR, Md. Knexus' GenAI solutions aim to enhance operational efficiency through cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: App Defense Alliance releases security standard ADA ASA v1.0 for mobile, web, and cloud on Oct. 16, 2024, in Singapore.
news.summary: In Singapore on October 16, 2024, the App Defense Alliance (ADA) introduced the ADA Application Security Assessment (ASA) v1.0. This new security standard is aimed at enhancing protection for sensitive data across mobile, web, and cloud platforms.

news.headline: Survey from Banfield Pet Hospital finds 48% of working Americans feel happier and 33% less stressed from volunteering. 63% are more motivated to volunteer now.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Banfield Pet Hospital revealed that 63% of respondents expressed increased motivation to volunteer compared to two years prior. The study, which involved nearly half of working Americans, also found that volunteering is believed to enhance mental wellbeing. The survey was conducted in Vancouver, Washington, with the results announced on October 16, 2024, through PRNewswire.

news.headline: TenNor secures over 300 million RMB financing to advance late-stage assets, including Rifasutenizol for H. pylori infections.
news.summary: TenNor Therapeutics, a company based in Suzhou, China, focused on developing treatments for infectious diseases, disclosed the first phase completion of a Series E funding round surpassing 300 million RMB. The latest investor, AMR, joined the initiative.

news.headline: DiMe Seal platform launches with 150+ users, aims to set industry standards for digital health software quality.
news.summary: In Boston on October 16, 2024, the Digital Medicine Society (DiMe) unveiled the DiMe Seal, a novel platform aimed at assessing digital health software products. Boasting an impressive start, the platform already has more than 150 active users, establishing a high standard in the industry for reliability and credibility.

news.headline: Win 50 free boxes of NEW Welch's® Juicefuls® Monster Splash™ for Halloween, possibly with a Butler. #celebrate();
news.summary: In celebration of Halloween, America's Favorite Fruit Snacks® is offering a giveaway to 50 fortunate households who will receive complimentary full-size boxes of the latest Welch's® Juicefuls® Monster Splash™ for Trick-or-Treaters. Additionally, recipients may also have the chance to have a Butler assist in distributing the treats. The promotion is set to take place in Park Ridge, N.J. starting from October 16, 2024.

news.headline: O3 Mining launching normal course issuer bid on TSXV and OTCQX. TORONTO, Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: O3 Mining Inc., a mining company trading on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol OIII and on the OTCQX under the symbol OIIIF, shared on October 16, 2024, that the TSXV has approved the Corporation's plan for a normal course of business. This is a positive development for the company as it indicates stability and growth.

news.headline: 70% of Americans impacted by inflation on holiday spending, Givex 2024 survey reveals. Credit cards, restaurant gift cards preferred with demand for promotions & loyalty rewards.
news.summary: During the holiday season, consumers are showing a preference for credit cards and restaurant gift cards. A report released by Givex, a leading global cloud-based customer engagement and business insights platform on October 16, 2024, revealed that consumers are increasingly looking for promotions and loyalty rewards. This trend highlights the importance of personalized incentives for consumers, with credit cards and restaurant gift cards being popular choices. This data showcases the significance of offering attractive rewards to engage customers effectively.

news.headline: Roundhill Investments announces distributions for XDTE, QDTE, and RDTE on Oct. 18, 2024. Important numbers not provided in the summary.
news.summary: In an announcement made on October 16, 2024, Roundhill Investments, a sponsor of ETFs specializing in cutting-edge financial products, revealed the distributions for their XDTE, QDTE, and RDTE funds. The distribution per share percentages for these funds were disclosed, along with the corresponding 30-Day SEC Yields. The information regarding the ex-date for these distributions was also provided.

news.headline: Wallarm introduces Security Edge, a SaaS solution safeguarding API Edge. Targets $1 billion market, surpasses conventional CDNs.
news.summary: A prominent company specializing in API security solutions has recently disclosed a significant development in their operations. Wallarm, renowned in the field, has unveiled Security Edge, a pioneering Software as a Service (SaaS) innovation. This advancement presents a game-changing opportunity in the market, estimated at a substantial $1 billion. Based in San Francisco, the announcement was made on October 16, 2024.

news.headline: Smoothie King reports Q3 2024 growth with 38 new store commitments and 28 new store openings, entering new states and marking the highest number of openings in six years.
news.summary: During the current quarter, Smoothie King has expanded its presence into New Hampshire and Delaware, marking its entry into two new states. The company has also undertaken a Colorado expansion initiative and opened its first new store in Austin in three years. As of October 16, 2024, Smoothie King holds the title of the world's largest smoothie brand and a fast-growing health and fitness destination.

news.headline: Sanofi donates $18 million to 3 Black medical schools to enhance diversity in clinical research over 10 years.
news.summary: Sanofi revealed today its plan to donate $18 million to support three Historically Black Medical Schools in their efforts to enhance diversity in clinical trials. This funding will be distributed over a decade to bolster the Centers of Excellence and further their initiatives.

news.headline: Field Effect reveals MDR Core cybersecurity solution for MSPs, customized for small businesses, launching soon.
news.summary: Field Effect, a leading global provider of cybersecurity solutions, has revealed plans to introduce their latest product, MDR Core. The new solution is designed to empower Managed Service Providers (MSPs) to safeguard all of their clients. This development was announced on October 16, 2024, in Ottawa, ON.

news.headline: 2024 HACR Corporate Inclusion Index™ Report underscores need for improved Hispanic inclusion in US corporations.
news.summary: Released on October 16, 2024 in Washington, a new report emphasizes the imperative for increased focus on Hispanic inclusivity. As per the 2024 HACR Corporate Inclusion Index™ (CII) Report, American companies are still lacking in this aspect and need to take substantial steps towards full inclusion.

news.headline: Pizza Hut introduces 'Personal Pan Pizza Hut,' allowing customers to create personalized pan pizzas. Limited time offer.
news.summary: Pizza enthusiasts can now reserve a spot at their exclusive Personal Pan Pizza Hut for a unique opportunity to craft their very own Personal Pan Pizza® with Pizza Hut's latest gourmet toppings. This groundbreaking initiative marks the first time ever that customers can book reservations for a personalized pizza experience. The event is scheduled to take place for a limited time only and is set to showcase Pizza Hut's newest and trendiest toppings. Located in Plano, Texas, the announcement was made on October 16, 2024. This initiative by Pizza Hut aligns with the celebration of National Pizza Day.

news.headline: Advanced Energy to report Q3 2024 results on October 30 and host an Analyst Day in NYC on November 19. Conference call at 4:30.
news.summary: In Denver, Advanced Energy (Nasdaq: AEIS) revealed details for its upcoming events. The company, known for precision power conversion solutions, shared that the Q3 2024 Earnings Conference Call is scheduled for Wednesday, October 30, 2024, post-market close. Management's call will commence at 4:30 PM. Advanced Energy's financial results for the third quarter of 2024 will be disclosed during this call. This event marks an important milestone for the global leader in this sector, and investors are eagerly anticipating the insights and updates that will be shared.

news.headline: PKI Spotlight integrates PKI Maturity Model Self-Assessment, enhancing PKI management with Consortium standards.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, PKI Solutions has introduced the PKI Maturity Model Self-Assessment from the PKI Consortium into PKI Spotlight, a state-of-the-art platform for live Public Key Infrastructure (PKI) monitoring and control. This enhancement will enable organizations to evaluate and enhance their PKI management strategies in accordance with the Consortium's top-notch benchmarks. The PKI Consortium, renowned globally for its commitment to ensuring PKI compliance, is offering this integration to empower organizations and improve overall PKI operations.

news.headline: Reading Horizons® Discovery LIVE in Kaysville, Utah streamlines teacher prep and boosts student engagement for Grades K-3.
news.summary: Reading Horizons, a top player in foundational literacy education, has recently launched Reading Horizons Discovery (RHD) LIVE in Kaysville, Utah. The platform aims to assist teachers in preparing lessons efficiently, engaging students effectively, and facilitating data-driven instruction. RHD LIVE is a part of the Reading Horizons Discovery Product Suite and offers valuable tools for administrators. This advanced platform promises to save time for educators and improve student outcomes, ultimately leading to increased success in the classroom.

news.headline: FIS study shows consumers turning to social media for financial advice, banks face challenges. #FinTech #TrustCliff
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, FIS, a leading financial technology company traded on NYSE under the symbol FIS, revealed insights from a recent study on U.S. consumer behavior. The study delves into generational dynamics with financial institutions, showcasing the hurdles traditional banks encounter in establishing credibility in personal finance amidst fast-paced technological progress and economic instability. Hashim Toussaint, the General Manager of Digital at FIS, commented on the findings.

news.headline: DCG launches DCI Index, ranks manufacturers' digital commerce based on data from 1.5M points, industry collaboration.
news.summary: A major achievement was unveiled by DCG in Las Vegas with the introduction of the Digital Commerce Intelligence Index (DCI Index), marking a pivotal moment in digital commerce capability assessment worldwide. This groundbreaking industry project, developed through a distinctive partnership, evaluates manufacturers' performance in digital commerce utilizing a comprehensive range of data and insights gathered from more than 1.5 million data points. The DCI Index consolidates data from reputable sources like Bazaarvoice and Int, offering an in-depth analysis of manufacturers' digital commerce effectiveness.

news.headline: ezCater's Lunch Report shows 49% of employees skip lunch weekly due to busy schedules; 23% fear not finishing work.
news.summary: In Boston, ezCater, a leading food tech platform for workplaces, unveiled its third annual Lunch Report, providing fresh insights into employees' lunch behaviors. The report highlights that a significant 98% of employees acknowledge the positive impact of lunch breaks on job performance and productivity. Surprisingly, nearly half (49%) of employees admit to skipping lunch at least once weekly. Reasons for this behavior include concerns about insufficient time to complete work (23%) and scheduling too many meetings to allow for a break (19%). These insights offer valuable perspectives on the lunch habits of workers in the workplace.

news.headline: Lookout introduces new features for Mobile Threat Defense, safeguarding against smishing and impersonation attacks. 16 years of industry experience.
news.summary: Today, Lookout, Inc., a leading data-centric cloud security company based in Boston, unveiled new features for its Mobile Threat Defense (MTD) solution, Lookout Mobile Endpoint Security. The latest enhancements aim to offer robust protection against two increasingly prevalent advanced social engineering tactics: smishing (SMS phishing) and executive impersonation fraud texts. Leveraging 16 years of experience in the MTD industry and possessing the largest AI-driven mobile security dataset globally, Lookout delivers top-tier defense mechanisms in the face of these evolving threats.

news.headline: Synchrony Financial (NYSE: SYF) releases Q3 2024 results on Sept. 30, 2024. Details on investor relations website.
news.summary: Synchrony Financial, based in Stamford, Connecticut, released their third quarter results for 2024 on October 16. The period ended on September 30, 2024. The company, listed on NYSE as SYF, provided details regarding their earnings through a news release and presentation accessible on their investor relations website. For more information, the full story can be read on a financial news platform.

news.headline: Former US officials launch A New Policy & A New Policy PAC to reform US Middle East policy. Stand for fairness & equal law.
news.summary: Two former U.S. government officials, Josh Paul and Tariq Habash, have stepped down from their positions due to differences in opinion regarding U.S. policy on Israel/Palestine. They have now established A New Policy and A New Policy PAC in an effort to advocate for changes in U.S. Middle East policy. Their goal is to cater to the majority of Americans who desire a shift in this policy direction. Emphasizing principles of fairness and equitable application of laws, A New Policy aims to build a strong and inclusive movement representing a diverse range of American voices.

news.headline: PublicSquare CEO Michael Seifert joins legal fight to defend religious freedom against government mandates by EEOC and HHS.
news.summary: Michael Seifert, the CEO of PublicSquare, has teamed up with the Dr. James Dobson Family Institute to file a lawsuit in the US District Court for the Northern District of Texas. This legal challenge aims to safeguard religious freedoms and Christian business practices from government regulations enforced by the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC) and the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS). The lawsuit addresses key issues regarding governmental mandates impacting religious beliefs.

news.headline: Global craft glue market expected to reach US$ 6,471.3 million by 2034, growing at 4.5% CAGR. North America holds 7% share in 2024. PVA glue segment to grow at 5%, creating US$ 751.7 million opportunity between 2024-2034. Major regions to create US$ 1,401.1 million opportunity collectively. Trend driven by interest in DIY projects, social media influence, and eco-conscious consumers.
news.summary: The global Craft Glue Market is projected to reach a valuation of US$ 4,167.0 million in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 4.5% during the forecast period of 2024 to 2034. The market growth is driven by increased interest in DIY projects, with popular products being liquid adhesives, glue sticks, and spray adhesives. Social media has played a role in boosting this interest, leading to a higher demand for strong and easy-to-apply craft adhesives. Manufacturers are focusing on developing safe, non-toxic, and environmentally-friendly formulas. Water-based and solvent-free adhesives are gaining traction, particularly for eco-conscious consumers and parents. Distribution channels include physical stores, specialty craft shops, and e-commerce platforms. The education sector is also contributing to market growth as crafting activities are incorporated into educational programs to enhance creativity and fine motor skills. The global craft glue market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 5% and reach US$ 6,471.3 million by 2034, creating an opportunity of US$ 2,304.2 million between 2024 to 2034. North America is estimated to hold a market share of 7% in 2024, with PVA glue expected to grow at a CAGR of 5%, creating an absolute $ opportunity of US$ 751.7 million between 2024 and 2034. North America and East Asia are expected to collectively create an absolute $ opportunity of US$ 1,401.1 million.

news.headline: HK enhances SME financing scheme by extending loan guarantee periods & new repayment options to support businesses.
news.summary: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has introduced improvements to the SME Financing Guarantee Scheme, providing extended loan guarantee periods and new repayment choices to aid businesses in need. These enhancements aim to bolster support for small and medium enterprises by offering longer guarantee terms and alternative repayment plans. This initiative seeks to assist businesses during these challenging times by offering more flexibility and options for financial assistance.

news.headline: Takayuki Ito elected President of International Federation of Robotics; will be joined by Vice President Jane Heffner.
news.summary: In Frankfurt am Main, Germany, Takayuki Ito has been chosen as the President of the International Federation of Robotics. This appointment comes after Marina Bill of ABB completed her term. Alongside Ito, Jane Heffner has been elected as the Vice President. Ito, from Fanuc Corporation, was previously the Vice President of the federation. The outgoing President, Marina Bill, had been in the position since 2022. Ito expressed pride in following the legacy of Bill, highlighting her significant contributions to the organization.

news.headline: Ark Invest predicts positive turn in Bitcoin price due to oversold conditions in SSRO, hitting -2.27 in early Sept, lowest since 2022 bear market lows. Story on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Leading asset management company Ark Invest has projected a rise in Bitcoin's price due to oversold conditions of the Stablecoin Supply Ratio Oscillator (SSRO). According to a report from the Cathie Wood-led firm, the SSRO, a gauge of Bitcoin's purchasing power, dropped to an oversold point of -2.27 in early September, a level not seen since the bear market lows of 2022. The SSRO is calculated by dividing the Bitcoin supply by major stablecoin supplies, all denominated in BTC. The ratio's 200-day moving average and 2 standard deviations above and below are then charted to track the fluctuations between these deviation bands. This development suggests a positive outlook for Bitcoin's price.
